scripts.prebuild: node scripts/guard-content.mjs && node scripts/guard-stale-facts.mjs && node scripts/fetch-github-stats.mjs && node scripts/generate-og-news.mjs
scripts.build:fast: npm run guard:check && npm exec --yes --package=node@24 -- node scripts/build-fast.mjs
scripts.build:full:node24: npm exec --yes --package=node@24 -- node scripts/copy-content.mjs && npm exec --yes --package=node@24 -- node node_modules/astro/bin/astro.mjs build && npm exec --yes --package=node@24 -- node scripts/build-pagefind.mjs && npm exec --yes --package=node@24 -- node scripts/enforce-built-font-policy.mjs && npm exec --yes --package=node@24 -- node scripts/audit-font-policy.mjs --dist
scripts.build: node scripts/copy-content.mjs && astro build && node scripts/build-pagefind.mjs && node scripts/enforce-built-font-policy.mjs && node scripts/audit-font-policy.mjs --dist
scripts.guard:check: node scripts/guard-content.mjs && node scripts/guard-stale-facts.mjs && node scripts/audit-font-policy.mjs --source
scripts.test:smoke: npm run smoke:api && npm run smoke:visual
scripts.audit:all: npm run audit:kpis && npm run audit:facts && npm run audit:provenance && npm run audit:freshness && npm run audit:sources
scripts.check:content: npm run guard:check && npm run check:links && npm run check:news
scripts.check:ci: npm run test:scripts && npm run audit:commands && npm run check && npm run build:fast
scripts.check: npm run guard:check && npm run check:links && npm run check:news && npm run check:security
